pain_points.signal: Software/hardware compatibility breaks (old devices lose support)
Critical functional failures (can't create wallet, can't link hardware wallet, app resets)
Assets locked/lost due to software bugs or account issues
Extremely slow app performance (slow to open, freezes, missed trading opportunities)
Poor or non-existent technical support and slow response
UI/UX bugs (charts not loading, dialog boxes cut off, background display errors)
Unreliable features (crypto debit card restricted without explanation, services withdrawn)
Security concerns/funds stolen with no recourse
Failed verification processes blocking account access
Missing tokens/limited asset support

desired_outcomes.outcome: Fast, reliable access to assets (no delays, no freezes)
Consistent, bug-free core functionality (wallet creation, linking, sending, receiving)
Robust backward compatibility with hardware and software
Responsive, helpful technical support
Smooth, intuitive user interface across all devices
Comprehensive asset/token support
Reliable advanced features (staking, swapping, debit card)
Low fees and fast transactions

pain_points.signal: App freezes or hangs frequently, leading to unresponsive interface and crashing on Android.

App shows excessive unnecessary data, cluttering the interface and confusing users.
Perceived security risks from bugs, slow updates, or unclear privacy in displaying balances.

Smooth integration with marketplaces, DEXs, and other dApps for quick connections.
Robust features like token address copying, QR code scanning, and payment option availability.
Secure and trustworthy app performance to protect assets and build confidence.
Helpful error logs and customer support to resolve issues promptly.

Complexity and unclear revenue splits causing creator anxiety about platform lock-in

High friction user onboarding requiring wallet creation and transaction signing

Simplified payment integration for dApps, especially for subscriptions or per-use fees
Cross-chain compatibility (e.g., EVM integration) to expand utility
Trustless mechanisms for AI agent transactions (e.g., escrow services)
Reduce user friction through embedded wallets
